title: cytisus linifolius
intro: Cytisus linifolius, commonly known as the French broom or Spanish broom, is a flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region. This plant contains cytisine, a toxic alkaloid with medicinal properties, and has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Cytisus linifolius include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and exhibit antibacterial and antifungal properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be carefully monitored due to its toxicity.
